mapper.sql: id, user_id, event_type, event_data, page_route, device_info, timestamp, server_time, add_time, update_time, deleted
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from litemall_tracker_event
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert:
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into litemall_tracker_event (user_id, event_type, event_data, page_route, device_info, timestamp, server_time, add_time, update_time, deleted) values (#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{eventType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{eventData,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{pageRoute,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deviceInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{timestamp,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{serverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT})

SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID()
insert into litemall_tracker_event
user_id,
event_type,
event_data,
page_route,
device_info,
timestamp,
server_time,
add_time,
update_time,
deleted,

#{eventType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{eventData,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
#{pageRoute,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{deviceInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},

#{serverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},

insert into litemall_tracker_event (user_id, event_type, event_data, page_route, device_info, timestamp, server_time, add_time, update_time, deleted) values
(#{item.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.eventType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.eventData,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.pageRoute,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.deviceInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{item.timestamp,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.serverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleted,jdbcType=BIT})
mapper.update:
update litemall_tracker_event
id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
event_type = #{record.eventType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
event_data = #{record.eventData,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
page_route = #{record.pageRoute,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
device_info = #{record.deviceInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
timestamp = #{record.timestamp,jdbcType=BIGINT},
server_time = #{record.serverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
add_time = #{record.addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted = #{record.deleted,jdbcType=BIT},

update litemall_tracker_event set id = #{record.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, user_id = #{record.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, event_type = #{record.eventType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, event_data = #{record.eventData,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, page_route = #{record.pageRoute,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, device_info = #{record.deviceInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, timestamp = #{record.timestamp,jdbcType=BIGINT}, server_time = #{record.serverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, add_time = #{record.addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{record.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{record.deleted,jdbcType=BIT}

update litemall_tracker_event
user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
event_type = #{eventType,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
event_data = #{eventData,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
page_route = #{pageRoute,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
device_info = #{deviceInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR},
timestamp = #{timestamp,jdbcType=BIGINT},
server_time = #{serverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
add_time = #{addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update litemall_tracker_event set user_id = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER}, event_type = #{eventType,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, event_data = #{eventData,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, page_route = #{pageRoute,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, device_info = #{deviceInfo,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, timestamp = #{timestamp,jdbcType=BIGINT}, server_time = #{serverTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, add_time = #{addTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, deleted = #{deleted,jdbcType=BIT} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update litemall_tracker_event set deleted = 1 where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
